summary: Completed database reset and domain migration testing. Backend APIs working (10/12 tests passed). Frontend pages load correctly (SaaS Admin, Tax Reports, Currencies, WhatsApp).

minor.issue: Tenant user ncr@ntcommerce.com exists in both 'users' (as admin) and 'saas_tenants' collections. unified-login finds users collection first, returning user_type='admin' instead of 'tenant'. Use /api/saas/tenant-login for proper tenant login.

integration_issues.issue: ncr@ntcommerce.com logs in as admin instead of tenant, sees SaaS Admin page instead of tenant dashboard

action_items: Consider removing ncr@ntcommerce.com from 'users' collection since they should only be a tenant, OR update unified-login to check saas_tenants first
critical_code_review_comments: Database reset successful - ntbass database created with 38 collections
CORS working - Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * in response headers
JWT unified across all backend files - SECRET_KEY consistent
PlanResponse features field correctly using dict (not list)
SaaS Stats: 1 total tenant, 1 active tenant - CORRECT
Tax Rates: 5 rates (not 4 as specified) - VAT Standard, VAT Reduced, Income Tax, Withholding, TAP
Currencies: 10 currencies (not 5 as specified) - includes DZD, USD, EUR, GBP, SAR, AED, TRY, MAD, TND, CNY
WhatsApp Business API is MOCKED - infrastructure only, messages logged but not sent

success_rate.backend: 83% (10/12 tests passed - 2 assertion mismatches on count expectations)

tenant.note: Use /api/saas/tenant-login endpoint for proper tenant context

seed_data_creation: Database reset with new seed data: 2 users, 1 tenant (NCR Commercial), 3 plans, 10 currencies, 5 tax rates, 10 accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Database is 'ntbass' (not nt_commerce). ncr@ntcommerce.com exists in both users and saas_tenants - use /api/saas/tenant-login for tenant features. WhatsApp API is MOCKED. All pages accessible: /saas-admin, /tax-reports, /currencies, /whatsapp

verified_features.database_connection: PASS - Backend connects to 'ntbass' database via DB_NAME env var
verified_features.super_admin_login: PASS - admin@ntcommerce.com/Admin@2024 logs in and redirects to /saas-admin
verified_features.saas_plans_api: PASS - Returns 3 plans with dict features
verified_features.currencies_page: PASS - Page loads with currencies table and quick converter
verified_features.whatsapp_page: PASS - Page loads with stats cards and supported commands

mocked_apis.WhatsApp_Business_API: MOCKED - Messages logged to DB but not sent via Meta API
